creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
During the investigation of the possible reasons of periodic hangups of the server, I build the WITNESS/INVARIANTS kernel. I receive multiple LORs during the startup of the server. bz@ kindly told me it's worth to report. So I'm doing this. I'm not aware if these LOR's actually are connected with my server's hangups.

Target machine is a IBM x3650 server. It runs IPv4, IPV6 via gif tunnel to the tunnelbroker, pf with a hundred of rules, pf nat, OSPFv6 with net/bird6, OSPFv4 with net/quagga, zfs.
